quick_wins.description: Features buildable in under 1 week. Low effort, high impact.

medium_builds.description: Features requiring 1-4 weeks. Moderate effort, significant competitive advantage.

strategic_features.description: Features requiring 1+ months. Major investment, market-defining potential.

item_schema.title: short feature name
item_schema.description: what it does and why it matters
item_schema.source: where we learned about this (review, conversation, competitor feature)
competitor_has_it: list of competitors with this feature
item_schema.status: identified | under_review | approved | in_progress | shipped | rejected
